message:
📖 Rename 'Failover Group' to 'Smart Channel' in all UI text (#101)

- Create Smart Channel, Add to Smart Channel, New Smart Channel
- Rename/Delete Smart Channel dialogs
- Play Smart Channel, Remove from Smart Channel actions
- 'N streams · smart channel' subtitle
- Snackbar messages updated
- Internal code names unchanged (failover mechanics)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:

                   ? _addToExistingFailoverGroup

               icon: const Icon(Icons.add, size: 16),
-              label: const Text('Add to Group'),
+              label: const Text('Add to Smart Channel'),
               style: FilledButton.styleFrom(
                 backgroundColor: const Color(0xFF2D3436),
               ),

               const SizedBox(height: 12),
